name: Easy Amaretto Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix without eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
2. Sprinkle the chopped almonds evenly in the bottom of the prepared pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, vegetable oil, water, amaretto, and almond extract. Mix until the dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Increase the speed to medium, and beat for 4 minutes. Stir in the remaining chopped almonds.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool the cake in the pan for 10-15 minutes, then remove and cool completely on a wire rack.
7. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, water, and butter. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Reduce heat to medium, and gently simmer for 4-5 minutes, stirring occasionally until the sugar dissolves.
9. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
10. Stir in the remaining amaretto and almond extract.
11. Punch holes in the top of the cake with a wooden pick, and slowly pour the glaze over the cake, allowing it to absorb into the cake.
12. Yield: one 10-inch cake.
